When the lesson began, Mira opened the dictionary and looked up the strange word. Her brother turned on the lamp and picked the book up from the floor. He had given up smoking last winter and taken up reading instead. She looked the new phrase up and wrote it down in her notebook. Later he turned the lights off, put his jacket on, and went out into the rain. They figured out the puzzle together before dinner. Finally, she closed the book, shut the window down, and picked her keys up from the table.
